generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values national security, I'm glad to see our leaders pushing back against the idea that we should weaken our alliances. The reality is that our partners rely on us just as much as we rely on them. Cutting back now would send the wrong signal to both allies and adversaries. We've seen what happens when deterrence weakens - it's not just about military strength, it's about the whole package of commitments that keeps us safe. Let's not fall for the false choice between strong alliances and civil liberties. We can have both if we're smart about it. #NationalSecurity #AllianceStrong
